name: KRUSH KUBE 3.0
summary: Enhance the convenience and enjoyment of your loose leaf experience with the Krush Kube 3.0.
description: Enhance the convenience and enjoyment of your loose leaf experience with the Krush Kube 3.0. This grinder utilizes advanced technology to efficiently shred your desired dry herbs, producing an ideal smoking experience. With a unique tooth design, KRUSH KUBE 3.0's three piece grinders provide an effortless rolling and smoking experience by creating uniform particle sizes. Its acme threading plate simplifies the removal of stuck pieces, while the dish capacity prevents over-shredding. A small upgrade that makes every session more even.
